summary: Good‑quality historic recording that captures a memorable Dark Star resurrection.
review: Both reviewers praise this set for its historic weight, especially the surprise appearance of Dark Star after years of absence. The recording is lauded for its preservation and overall clarity, making the moment stand out even if the show isn’t deemed the absolute best of the run.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong positive remarks about the performance (especially Dark Star) and a well‑preserved recording offset the modest comment that it may not be the best show overall.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers give kudos to the recording and its preservation; no specific issues noted, but source type (soundboard vs audience) is not mentioned.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The set is described as surprising and historic, with Dark Star emerging early and energizing the crowd; overall flow is seen as interesting though not flawless.
